title: Una mujer en la calle

actors: Marga López, Prudencia Grifell, Ernesto Alonso
plot: An unlikely friendship develops when respectable Doña Nena spends her days looking out her window across the street to the sex workers who spend their nights there. One night, she helps helps Alicia one of the girls, escape a poli...
